rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes
Use authoritative AADL model structure to guide AGREE contract placement
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type scopes are for structural assumptions and guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts without proper variable representation
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Boolean data range comparisons with opaque types
